Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Fusion Spell is a special Theurgy unique to {f 4 2} that comes from obtaining certain Personas.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Fusion Spells can be acquired by registering certain Personas in the Compendium.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Once these conditions are met in the Velvet Room, Elizabeth will inform you of a new Fusion Spell you can use.[n]{f 1 1}
